title: Laptop Build & Configuration
summary: Standard operating procedure for imaging and configuring a new laptop.
purpose: Ensure every laptop issued to staff is consistently imaged, secured, and recorded before deployment.
scope: All new and replacement laptops for Circle Gas employees.

roles.responsibility: Performs the imaging, configuration and asset registration.
Approves hardware procurement and signs off completed builds.

steps.title: Unbox and inspect hardware
steps.description: Unbox the laptop and inspect for physical damage. Record the serial number and model in the asset register before powering on.
steps.notes: Do not power on before recording the serial number — it may be needed for warranty purposes.

steps.title: Boot from imaging USB and apply standard image
steps.description: Insert the approved imaging USB. Boot into WinPE and run the imaging script to apply the latest approved Windows image from the network share.
steps.notes: Confirm the image version matches the current approved build in IT Glue before applying.

steps.title: Join to domain and apply MDM policy
steps.description: Join the laptop to the corporate Active Directory domain. Enrol in Microsoft Intune (MDM). Verify that group policies and compliance policies are applied.
steps.notes: Laptop must be connected to the corporate network (wired) or VPN during domain join.

steps.title: Install standard software bundle
steps.description: Install the standard software suite via Intune / Software Centre: Microsoft 365 Apps, Teams, Chrome, Defender, VPN client, and any role-specific applications noted in the onboarding request.
steps.notes: Do not install unlicensed or non-approved software. Check the approved software list in IT Glue.
checklist: Defender running and up to date

steps.title: Enable BitLocker encryption
steps.description: Enable BitLocker on the C: drive. Ensure the recovery key is backed up to Azure AD automatically. Verify encryption status.
steps.notes: Do not hand over the laptop until BitLocker is fully encrypted — check status with manage-bde -status.
checklist: Recovery key backed up to Azure AD

steps.title: Run QA checks and sign off
steps.description: Run through the QA checklist: test internet, email, Teams, VPN, and printer connectivity. Confirm all software opens correctly. IT Manager signs off the build record.
steps.notes: Log the completed build in the asset register with the assigned user and handover date.
checklist: Asset register updated with assigned user

changeHistory.author: IT Engineer
changeHistory.notes: Added BitLocker step as mandatory. Updated software bundle.
